summary: Iteration 232: Phase 5 Inventory & Product Intelligence - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully. The new Inventory Intelligence page renders correctly at /admin/reports/inventory with title 'Inventory & Product Intelligence'. KPI row shows 7 cards (Total Products, Units Sold, Revenue, Top Product, Fast, Slow, Dead). 4 tabs visible (Overview, Fast, Slow/Dead, Procurement). Overview tab shows Top 10 Products bar chart, Product Health pie chart, and Sales Trend line chart. Fast tab shows Fast-Moving Products table. Slow/Dead tab shows Slow & Dead Stock table with status badges and days inactive column. Procurement tab shows Restock Recommendations, Review/Remove, Top Vendors, and Underperforming Vendors sections. PDF and CSV export buttons present. Date filter dropdown (30/90/180/365 days) works. Sidebar shows Inventory Intelligence link under Reports & Analytics for admin, sales_manager, and finance_manager roles. All regression tests pass - Admin, Sales Manager, and Finance Manager dashboards still work correctly.

tests: Response has kpis object with total_products, total_units_sold, total_product_revenue, top_product, fast_products, slow_products, dead_products
Response has products array with classification (fast/moderate/slow/dead) and trend (increasing/decreasing/stable)
Response has charts with top_10_revenue, classification_distribution, sales_trend arrays
Response has procurement with restock_recommendations, review_remove, top_vendors, weak_vendors arrays

components_verified.title: Inventory & Product Intelligence

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Inventory & Product Intelligence fully implemented and tested. New report page added at /admin/reports/inventory with comprehensive product performance and procurement intelligence. The endpoint GET /api/admin/reports/inventory-intelligence aggregates paid order items to build product performance metrics. Products are classified as: Fast (high sales, recent activity), Moderate, Slow (no sale in 30 days), Dead (no sale in 60+ days). The page has 4 tabs: Overview (Top 10 Products bar chart, Product Health pie chart, Sales Trend line chart), Fast (fast-moving products table), Slow/Dead (slow and dead stock table with days inactive column), Procurement (restock recommendations, review/remove, top vendors, underperforming vendors). All management roles (admin, sales_manager, finance_manager) can access the page. PDF and CSV export buttons are present. Date filter supports 30/90/180/365 days. All previous phases (1-4) continue to work correctly.
